variants: Currently residing in Sandpiper Run, Talitha Keaton was born in Foxglove Corners and has built a successful career at Zinnia Peak Hotels. A proud alumna of the Mapleford Institute, she has utilized her educational background to excel in the hospitality field. Throughout her professional journey, Talitha has consistently delivered outstanding service and operational efficiency, culminating in her receipt of the Shadowvine Honor. Her achievements signify a deep commitment to enhancing guest experiences and exemplify her dedication to the industry.
